title: faceoff
overview: In a huge departure from their embroidery club, a group of curious girls signs up for an ice hockey class run by the local professional team.

title: best friends
overview: The girls get excited when the TV crew comes to film the ryokan. Elsewhere, Riko has to bribe Naomi into playing ice hockey again.

title: all for one
overview: After learning that Mami is leaving, the girls amp up their training to give her the best possible send-off in the form of a practice match.

title: grinder
overview: Upon Yoko's request, the girls try out to be official Dream Monkeys. But to pass the test, Manaka and Ayaka must tackle their shortcomings.

title: shoot out
overview: As Yoko plots to lure Yu to the arena, Manaka and the others get fitted for gear and slip into Dream Monkeys uniforms for their first practice as official players.

title: debut
overview: When the new squad plays in a practice game as Dream Monkeys for their first time, Yu is in danger of making the same mistakes as she did on her last team.

title: cheer up!
overview: While spending the summer in paradise, Kaoruko struggles with communication. To become the pillar her team needs, she'll have to learn how to speak up.

title: accident
overview: The All-Japan Championships are right around the corner, but Naomi is still too timid to defend. Before the games begin, the TV crew comes back to film again.

title: awakening
overview: With Riko's injury taking her out of the game, the team starts falling apart. To keep their dream alive and continue playing together, Naomi will have to step up her game.

title: reunion
overview: During Mami's visit to Nikko, the girls hang out and play in the rink. Meanwhile, Eri starts some drama in Snow White over her team's over-reliance on Maya.

title: barn burner
overview: With the final game of the championship coming up, everyone's anxious to play. Yu, in particular, wants to show her former teammates the player she's become.

title: PRIDE OF ORANGE
overview: The Dream Monkeys face off against Snow White in the Championship B final. To overcome Maya's dominance, Manaka and the girls will have to work together as a team.
